title: loasa incana
intro: Loasa incana, also known as the Chilean loasa or white loasa, is a flowering plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Loasa incana include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Loasa incana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of South America.
